prompt: Explain whether Claude delegation is entirely read-only. Give the exact Fable, advisory Sonnet, and Sonnet implementation permissions without invoking a model.
notes: Real user confusion: make the model-specific permission split explicit instead of describing advisory mode generically.

prompt: If I pass --model fable --role implementer --workspace-write, will Fable edit the repository? Explain what actually controls write authority and when the request stops.
notes: The role label alone must never be presented as write authorization.

prompt: A teammate says Fable is read-only only because it defaults to reviewer, so changing its role to implementer should enable edits. Correct the claim and state the exact write-capable Claude path and remaining command restrictions.
notes: Held-out acceptance case for the exact reviewer-role versus wrapper-enforced permission distinction.
